title: Thumbnail Maker ++
description: Thumbnail Maker ++ lets you easily create clean, customizable thumbnails for your Minecraft projects or youtube thumbnails
body:
# Thumbnail Maker ++
- Forget Blender and Blockbench, this is way easier!

- Runs smooth, even on a weak machine.

- NPCs that can pose, fight, and chill for your shots.

- 21 shaders already packed in, no hunting required.

- Super simple. Make thumbnails in minutes.
 
- Just grab the modpack and start.

- (If you don’t try it, you’re missing out 😼)
